query_normalized: multi-lcb: extending livecodebench to multiple programming languages computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (b) and (e) as it empirically measures the performance of Large Language Models on programming tasks across multiple non-English languages, directly addressing the "Multiple Programming Languages" aspect of the user's question regarding the extension of LiveCodeBench.
